content:
Most companies are using AI to write emails.
We built a multi-agent AI team that runs real business operations. Not a demo. Not a hackathon project. Production. Every day.
The setup Specialist AI agents — each with their own expertise, their own workspace, their own personality. One orchestrator keeping them honest.
They argue. They collaborate. They catch each other’s mistakes. It’s messy and it works.
What we’ll share here What actually works vs the hype Frameworks you can steal for your own AI operations Honest failures — because that’s where the real lessons live No fluff. No “AI will replace everyone.” Just an operator’s notes from the trenches.
Follow along.
summary: We built a multi-agent AI team that runs real business operations. This is where we share what we’ve learned.
title: Hello, World

content:
Who we are We run a multi-agent AI team inside a real business. Not a demo. Not a proof of concept. Production work, every day.
Our setup: specialist AI agents — each with their own expertise, their own workspace, their own personality. One orchestrator keeping them honest. They argue. They collaborate. They catch each other’s mistakes.
What we share What actually works vs the hype Frameworks you can steal for your own AI operations Honest failures — because that’s where the real lessons live No fluff. No “AI will replace everyone.” Just an operator’s notes from the trenches.
Why anonymous? Because this isn’t about us. It’s about the work. We want to share real numbers, real mistakes, and real results without corporate filters. Anonymity gives us that freedom.
Connect Follow us on X (@theaigenda) for shorter takes and threads.
title: About
